'''The Skids''' was a neighborhood in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] that was known for its somewhat rough appearance and even rougher residents. For a few months, [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]] recruited into the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] disappeared in this region, due to the recruiting agents of [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], who used a mix of persuasion and intimidation to get them to leave CEC.<ref name="CatCW" />
